data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Apple.com implements a responsive design that adapts to different screen sizes and devices.
data.technical_spec: Uses a mobile-first approach with CSS media queries and fluid grids.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Utilizes a CDN to distribute web content globally for better load times and availability.
data.technical_spec: Employs Akamai and Apple's own CDN for caching and geo-distribution.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Adopts a microservices architecture for modular development and scalability.
data.technical_spec: Decomposed into independent services managed via container orchestration.

data.title: Progressive Enhancement
data.description: Enhances the user experience based on browser capabilities without excluding older ones.
data.technical_spec: Uses feature detection scripts and polyfills for legacy support.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Centralized entry point for managing API traffic and integration.
data.technical_spec: Built with heavily cached layers using Fastly and Apple's homegrown API gateway solutions.
